title: Loops in details
description: for-of vs for-in, labels, and infinite loops.

options: Values of iterables (arrays, strings, Sets, Maps)
questions.explanation: for-of yields VALUES from any iterable.

questions.code:
const obj = { a: 1, b: 2 };
for (const key in obj) console.log(key);

questions.prompt: Which loop is BEST for iterating an array?
questions.explanation: for-of is the modern choice for arrays. for-in over an array is discouraged (inherited props, order surprises).
Labels + break outer breaks the OUTER loop entirely.

questions.prompt: Which is the most typical `for` pattern for reverse iteration?
questions.explanation: Start at last valid index (length - 1), stop at 0 inclusive.
Empty condition = infinite loop; break exits when i > 2.
